metadata.name: Approve New Supplier for Raw Material

description: Procurement wants to use a new supplier for a raw material. QA must review the trial lot data and approve the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the QC test results for the trial lot received from the new supplier.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the lab results for the trial material.

nodes.task_description: Compare the results to the material's specification and to the results from the current supplier.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the new supplier's material meets all specs and is comparable to the incumbent.

nodes.task_description: Update the approved supplier list (ASL) for the raw material to include the new supplier.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the new supplier to the material's ASL in the system.
